title: ConstituentCase
description: A constituent service case handled by the Manhattan Borough President's office — a resident request for help or referral, published in de-identified aggregate. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Constituent Services' dataset (39qw-754y, 13 columns) and the older 'Constituent Services - Historical' (kpjg-ubxi). Cases are published without personal identifiers; the office publishes case type, subject, status, and geography, never the constituent's identity.

language.description: Constituent language, historical dataset ('Language (If blank, English)').
